tasks.task: Install Go and Fly CLI, test API locally (go run . in api/)
Convert index.html to PWA — manifest.json, service worker, installable on phone home screen
Add Web Push notifications — VAPID keys, subscribe endpoint, daily noon push from server
Deploy to Fly.io — fly launch, create volume, verify phone push works
Wire frontend to API — index.html fetches from Go server instead of static JSON
